cards.title: What It Means When Your Child Says 'I Hate You'
cards.body: Most parents hear "I hate you" during conflicts with their children. Understanding this common phrase helps you respond thoughtfully rather than react emotionally.

cards.title: What Is Teaching Teens About Love?
cards.body: Screens are shaping how teenagers understand love and relationships. Parents remain the most powerful influence, and starting conversations early makes a real difference.

cards.title: Hope and Care for the Special Needs Family
cards.body: Having a neurodiverse or physically disabled family member creates significant stress for nuclear families. Understanding the unique challenges helps parents navigate support options.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Family estrangement exists on a spectrum rather than as a binary choice. Support plays an important role in wellbeing, whether people seek reconciliation or not.

cards.title: Britain Must Support Families Raising Children
cards.body: Government spending billions on childcare support aims to ensure families can afford to raise children. Stopping profiteers from capturing these benefits is essential.
